summary: Comprehensive testing of EcoRent UK Property Management SaaS completed successfully. All backend APIs working (100% pass rate) and frontend features functioning properly including 3D glassmorphism design, lead capture, authentication, CRUD operations, HEM calculator, and AI-powered tenant chat.
passed_tests: Lead capture form submission with email notifications
User registration and login authentication flow
Property CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
HEM Calculator with energy efficiency calculations
AI-powered tenant chat with Claude Sonnet 4.5 categorization
Landing page 3D glassmorphism hero card with mouse tracking
UK localization with GBP currency symbols
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (15/15 tests), Frontend: 95% (all core features working)
